## Acceptance Criteria

## Definition of Done

- [ ] All acceptance criteria met
- [ ] All tests pass (existing and new)
- [ ] Linter and formatter clean
- [ ] Structured logging present on new operations
- [ ] Loading, error, and empty states exist for new UI elements
- [ ] Baseline accessibility met for new UI elements (semantic HTML, form labels, color not the only indicator)
- [ ] Audit event emitted from any new or modified CRUD handler (Loop 1+)
- [ ] Component tests for new UI components (Loop 3+)
- [ ] Auth checks on new endpoints (Loop 10+)
- [ ] ARIA attributes on dynamic content (Loop 10+)
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
